name: energetic
description: Active lifestyle fuel with outdoor adventures, workout energy, and the vitality of a body in motion. This mood captures the supplement as the invisible engine behind an active life — hiking, cycling, running, living fully.

style.lighting: bright outdoor natural | dynamic action sport light | golden hour adventure glow
style.color_grade: vivid greens and sky blue | golden sun accents | high energy natural palette
style.camera: dynamic action tracking | wide adventure establishing | close-up supplement mid-adventure
style.composition: supplement in adventure context | athlete-nature pairing | movement-first framing
style.props: water bottle, trail running shoes, backpack, bike helmet, supplement packet, outdoor gear

copy_tone: Energizing and action-oriented. Pairs supplement benefits with real activities. 'Fuel your trail.' 'Recovery starts at the summit.' Active voice, present tense, movement in every sentence.

music.mood: upbeat adventure rock, driving outdoor energy, positive adrenaline

example_prompt_fragment: A dynamic outdoor scene of a trail runner pausing on a scenic Malaysian hillside, pulling a GAIA Supplements wellness pack from a backpack, bright golden hour sunlight, lush green jungle canopy in background, vivid natural greens with golden sun accents, action sport wide angle, energetic active lifestyle supplement photography
